title: Hydra live cloud resources ledger
description: Append-only ledger of live cloud resources (InsForge projects/deployments/buckets/functions, seeded rows, test users, EC2/compute, externally-billable API keys) that workers provision while implementing or testing a ticket. The Commander review gate is diff-bound and cannot see live cloud residue; this ledger gives Commander something to audit and tear down. Populated by the worker-implementation agent's cloud-cleanup checklist (NEVER records secrets/tokens — identifiers/handles only). See docs/specs/2026-06-01-cloud-side-effect-tracking.md and the 'Cloud side-effects' section of .claude/agents/worker-implementation.md.

resources.description: One entry per live resource a worker provisioned. Append-only; never auto-pruned.

provider.description: Cloud provider / platform the resource lives in, e.g. 'insforge', 'aws', 'vercel'.

identifier.description: Provider-side handle that identifies the resource: a project ref, bucket name, deployment URL, function name, etc. NEVER a token, key, or secret.

ticket.description: Ticket ref that provisioned this resource, e.g. '#189' or 'LIN-123'.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the resource was created.

disposition.description: ephemeral-cleaned = throwaway test data the worker removed before opening the PR. persists = intentionally kept (must have a reason in notes). pending-teardown = still live and awaiting a deliberate teardown (the review gate blocks a PR that leaves this with no plan).

notes.description: Short free-text justification. Required in spirit for 'persists' (why it stays) and 'pending-teardown' (the teardown plan).
